elements.text: H-bonds are geometric perfectionists. Maximum strength occurs only when the Donor-H-Acceptor alignment is collinear.

elements.prompt: A professional scientific vector diagram on a white background. On the left, a linear Donor-Hydrogen...Acceptor bond arrangement labeled '180° (Strongest)'. On the right, a bent arrangement labeled '120° (Weakened)'. At the bottom, a horizontal 'Strength Meter' bar with a color gradient from deep green (at 180°) to bright red (at 120°). Clean lines, academic style, high resolution.
